items.summary: Ensure the backend stores a hashed or plaintext admin username and password, and the adminLogin function validates credentials and returns an admin token or session that grants permission to approve or reject feedback. The approved/rejected status field on feedback records must be persisted in stable storage.

In the AdminDashboard, ensure the admin login form (AdminLoginForm) uses the stored username and password credentials for authentication. After successful login, the feedback management tab must list all submitted feedback and allow the authenticated admin to approve or reject each item using inline approve/reject actions.

In the ReviewsSection on the homepage, fetch only feedback items with an 'approved' status from the backend and display them alongside the hardcoded seed reviews. Non-approved (pending or rejected) feedback must not appear in this section.
